title: UnChipped
description: Craft Chipped‘s blocks back to their origin using a stonecutter
body:
## What is this for?
With this data pack, you can convert the block variants added by [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) back to their origin in a stonecutter. This can be timesaving and useful in modpacks like Create, as it also works in Create's mechanical saw.

## Why should I use this and not other data packs?
This data pack _only_ adds recipes to "uncraft" the blocks, so you can do things like this:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DaBs-sz0jKA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_(In the end of the video, you can see how it works with the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)/[Create Fabric Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric))_

### Credits:
This datapack was made with [Misode's Data Pack Generator](https://misode.github.io/).
